title: Confluence-to-SpecGraph Design Bridge
summary: Defines a Confluence/markdown system design template mapping to SpecGraph's Spark and Shape authoring stages for zero-rework migration.
notes: RFC/DRAFT status with an Approach & Decisions table resembling an ADR, but subject matter is a template/process artifact rather than a codebase architecture decision, and document also carries PRD-style Scope/Success-Criteria (MoSCoW) structure. Classified as PRD due to requirements/scope framing; not locked since status is DRAFT, not Accepted.
